title: Beta Archive
description: Bringing Minecraft's newest version back to its roots. Removed mobs, Beta world gen, classic textures and other surprises!
body:
This is a horror/liminal pack that is meant to make you feel uncomfortable. I do not want to spoil anything so I won't say much but know this isn't a normal Minecraft experience. This is meant to emulate that liminal feeling of early beta Minecraft versions. 

Imagine you're a kid again, its 1am on a Saturday night and your friends have been playing survival with you for hours. Everyone else is really tired so they decide to go to bed. You aren't tired and wanna play more but now you're alone. 

You've been laughing and having fun for hours. Nothing else is different, but now what might lie behind that fog seems a lot scarier. 

![mainmenu](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/HUiPVXwG/images/9dc9fdff3192eea113374764f784896b39ecce4e.png)










**WARNING**

**On boot make sure to select Modern Beta as the world type.**

**Do not change any other settings if you don’t have to. The intended experience is what is set up when you launch for the first time.**
